name: Dogmatika Theo, the Iron Punch
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>教導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラグマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>槌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>テオ
desc: Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dogmatika Theo, the Iron Punch" once per turn. If a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster on the field that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; until the end of this turn, this card gains 600 ATK, and if it does, the targeted monster loses 600 ATK.
mnst_eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dogmatika Theo, the Iron Punch" once per turn. If a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster on the field that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; until the end of this turn, this card gains 600 ATK, and if it does, the targeted monster loses 600 ATK.
eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dogmatika Theo, the Iron Punch" once per turn. You can target 1 face-up monster on the field that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck; until the end of this turn, this card gains 600 ATK, and if it does, the targeted monster loses 600 ATK.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
